texto: In the war upon the powers of darkness prayer is the primary and mightiest weapon both in aggressive war upon them and their works in the deliverance of men from their power and against them as a hierarchy of powers opposed to Christ and His Church.
explicacao: Citação de Jessie Penn-Lewis sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “In the war upon the powers of darkness prayer is the primary and mightiest weapon both in aggress…” articula reflexao, prayer, powers em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao-noturna.
